key_findings: CI narrowed 40% (0.55→0.33) but still too wide for variant discrimination
S monotonicity BROKEN: inverted-U curve, peak at S=0.20 (v3c)
Original 'more S = better' was a small-sample artifact (n=29)
Split-half: ALL variants unstable (Δ>0.15) — partial_r landscape is flat
v3c wins by Occam's razor: equal weights, no data-driven tuning needed
Best alternative M10_A10_S20_C30_CD30 (pr=0.484) is within CI and unstable
recommendation: Stop weight optimization. Focus on GT expansion (n>200) or new components if improvement needed.
